location: Dropped by the Death Rite Bird found on the plateau southwest of Castle Sol, Mountaintops of the Giants — notable as the only Death Rite Bird active during the day instead of only at night.
tactics: This particular Deathbird is considered one of the hardest in the game due to late-game stat scaling combined with very high attack speed — go in at full health and punish openings rather than trade
From Castle Sol Main Gate grace, head west up onto the plateau; alternatively drop in from Snow Valley Ruins Overlook to the east
Its sweeping wing and beak attacks cover more distance than they look like they should — don't stand still to heal mid-fight
Unlike most Deathbirds this one doesn't vanish if you leave and return at a different time of day, so a safe reset is always available
lore: Once carried by priests who tended the Deathbirds, the spear marked its bearer as a sworn guardian of the birds, its ritual serving as a pledge to be reborn again in some distant age.

builds.name: Intelligence/Dex quality poke
builds.why: Even D-scaling in both Dexterity and Intelligence plus its Spearcall Ritual skill (ground-based spear explosions) suits an Int/Dex battlemage, though the skill misses airborne targets
